title: Predicting a historic storm earlier with WeatherNext
summary: WeatherNext is Google DeepMind's global weather forecasting AI model that successfully predicted Hurricane Melissa's intensity and track in October 2025, providing advance notice that enabled evacuation warnings days before the storm made landfall in Jamaica. The tool demonstrates AI's capability in high-stakes meteorological prediction and is being developed in collaboration with the National Hurricane Center.
